text: Kalonzo is a coward who has done nothing tangible in 50 years in politics. Sahii ameenda recess juu gachagua hayuko. Matiangi is good under someone and he has proven to disregard court orders. Sifuna is the only one we can trust to bring us back to constitutional way of doing things. Wild thought.
@Lightcasttvke Its brainless people like you that talk a lot, and keep Kenya behind... What kind of brain is this... Bado ni WANTAM
Sifuna is a ballon, a big-mouth paper tiger with no political base, not even at home in Bungoma. He is headed straight into political oblivion as a wantam senator unless he returns to the ODM Party
Ruto is a cornered, dangerously desperate tyrant. Our Unity will defeat Kasongo. #TumainiLiko #FagiaWakoraWote #TuokoeKenya #RutoMustGo
